zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Montagu於1270年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾爾頓 福利亞特時，她的父親Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu21歲，母親Hawise St Amand18歲。她於1284年與Sir Henry de Tyeys在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年在英國奧可福爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Montagu于1270年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾爾頓 福利亞特时，她的父亲Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu21岁，母亲Hawise St Amand18岁。她于1284年与Sir Henry de Tyeys在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年在英国奧可福爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Montagu was born in 1270, in Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, was 21 and her mother, Hawise St Amand, was 18. She married Sir Henry de Tyeys in 1284, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1322, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Montagu est née en 1270, à Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Hawise St Amand, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry de Tyeys en 1284, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1322, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Montagu 1270 in Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu 21 und ihre Mutter Hawise St Amand 18. Sie hat 1284 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Henry de Tyeys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1322 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England.

Lei sposato Sir Henry de Tyeys nel 1284, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1322, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Montaguが1270年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアチルトン フォリアトで生まれた時，父Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montaguは21歳，母Hawise St Amandは18歳であった。1284年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでSir Henry de Tyeysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Montagu(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 치턴 폴리앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise St Amand(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Sir Henry de Tyeys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Montagu родилась в 1270 г. в местности чилтон фолят, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise St Amand, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry de Tyeys в 1284 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1322 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Sir Henry de Tyeys en 1284, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1322, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
